message:
fix: subprocess codegen uses __global_allocator and EnvironmentVarGuard stub

- Fixed subprocess.call/run/check_output using 'allocator' instead of
  '__global_allocator' in generated Child.init() calls
- Added EnvironmentVarGuard stub to os_helper.zig with init(), __enter__,
  __exit__, set(), unset() methods for context manager protocol
